title: Spain Celebrates Both a Soccer Win and a Sense of Wider Success
summary_full: For many fans, the World Cup victory cemented a belief that something promising — a cultural, economic and sports revival — is happening in the country.
summary_public: For many fans, the World Cup victory cemented a belief that something promising — a cultural, economic and sports revival — is happening in the country.
